content.text: I'll investigate the current state of the SparkPi job and fix the issues.

input.command: kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi 2>&1; echo "---PODS---"; kubectl get pods -n spark-pi 2>&1; echo "---EVENTS---"; kubectl get events -n spark-pi --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' 2>&1 | tail -20
input.description: Check job, pod, and event status

input.command: kubectl get job spark-pi -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1; echo "---ROLE---"; kubectl get role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi -o yaml 2>&1; echo "---SA---"; kubectl get sa -n spark-pi 2>&1

content.content:
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi","namespace":"spark-pi"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":0,"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"spark-pi","component":"driver"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/bash","-c","echo \"==============================================\"\necho \"  SparkPi Job\"\necho \"==============================================\"\nexport SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)\n/opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \\\n  --master local[2] \\\n  --driver-memory 512m \\\n  --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \\\n  /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \\\n  1000\nEXIT_CODE=$?\necho \"SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE\"\nexit $EXIT_CODE\n"],"image":"apache/spark:3.5.3","name":"spark-submit","resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"500m","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"200m","memory":"512Mi"}}}],"restartPolicy":"Never","serviceAccountName":"spark-pi"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T11:07:15Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-pi
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 2f5ca6dd-fe15-44ae-bd09-ae7264cc5e7b
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
    component: driver
    controller-uid: 2f5ca6dd-fe15-44ae-bd09-ae7264cc5e7b
    job-name: spark-pi
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
  resourceVersion: "296020"
  uid: 2f5ca6dd-fe15-44ae-bd09-ae7264cc5e7b
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 2f5ca6dd-fe15-44ae-bd09-ae7264cc5e7b
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 2f5ca6dd-fe15-44ae-bd09-ae7264cc5e7b
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
        component: driver
        controller-uid: 2f5ca6dd-fe15-44ae-bd09-ae7264cc5e7b
        job-name: spark-pi
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-submit
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: 512Mi
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark-pi
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  active: 1
  ready: 1
  startTime: "2026-06-18T11:07:15Z"
  terminating: 0
  uncountedTerminatedPods: {}
---ROLE---
apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
kind: Role
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1","kind":"Role","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"spark-pi-role","namespace":"spark-pi"},"rules":[{"apiGroups":[""],"resources":["services","configmaps","persistentvolumeclaims"],"verbs":["create","get","list","watch","delete","update","patch"]}]}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T11:06:58Z"
  name: spark-pi-role
  namespace: spark-pi
  resourceVersion: "295937"
  uid: e4e7f5de-27b7-47c2-954c-70eb8b36c8ee
rules:
- apiGroups:
  - ""
  resources:
  - services
  - configmaps
  - persistentvolumeclaims
  verbs:
  - create
  - get
  - list
  - watch
  - delete
  - update
  - patch
---SA---
NAME       SECRETS   AGE
default    0         31s
spark-pi   0         30s

content.text: The job currently deployed already has correct image, serviceAccount, and memory format. The Role is still missing the `pods` resource. Let me patch the RBAC and wait for the job to complete.

input.command:
kubectl patch role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi --type=json -p='[{"op": "add", "path": "/rules/0/resources/-", "value": "pods"}]' 2>&1
echo "---WAIT---"
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/spark-pi -n spark-pi --timeout=300s 2>&1
echo "exit: $?"
input.description: Patch role to add pods, wait for job completion

description: Patch role to add pods, wait for job completion
